summary: Defined a minimal, safe scope to test the PR workflow by changing a single visible, non-functional text string in src/pages/Index.tsx. Provided success metrics, acceptance criteria, and PR templates. Handing off to Project Manager to coordinate execution and assign implementation.

Created a concise PRD with acceptance criteria focused on a single text-only change
Outlined success metrics tied to PR creation, CI pass, and zero behavior change
Provided branch, commit, and PR description templates for consistency
artifacts_updated: No repository artifacts updated in this stage
decision_or_outcome: Proceed with a single visible text-only change in src/pages/Index.tsx to validate branch/commit/PR flow
No logic, styling, layout, imports, or behavior changes allowed
Keep the change trivially safe (e.g., punctuation or single word tweak in a top-level heading/hero text)

blockers_or_risks: Index.tsx content unknown; engineer must select a clearly visible string to modify without affecting behavior

implementation_plan.goal: Test the PR workflow end-to-end with a trivial, safe change that cannot impact behavior: modify one visible text string in src/pages/Index.tsx.
implementation_plan.issue_body:
Task: Make a single, visible, non-functional text-only change in src/pages/Index.tsx to validate PR flow. Do not alter logic, imports, component structure, styling, or behavior.

Constraints:
- Change exactly one visible string literal in src/pages/Index.tsx (e.g., add an exclamation mark to the main heading or swap a single word like "Welcome" -> "Welcome!" or "Hello").
- Do not modify imports, props, styles, classes, layout, or any logic.
- Keep the diff to one line in one file.

Deliverables:
- New branch with conventional name.
- Single commit with clear message.
- Open PR with the provided template, include a brief rationale and a screenshot showing the updated text.

Definition of Done (Acceptance Criteria):
- Exactly one text literal changed in src/pages/Index.tsx; no other files modified.
- No import, logic, or styling changes; component renders identically except for the text.
- CI/lint/build pass; no snapshot regressions beyond the changed text.
- PR targets default branch, references this task, and follows pull_request_review.md.
- Reviewer can easily verify the change visually and via diff.
recommended_first_changes: Identify a top-level, prominently visible text literal in src/pages/Index.tsx (e.g., page heading/hero).
Modify only the literal text minimally (e.g., append an exclamation point or change one word), ensuring no variable interpolation or functional impact.
Verify local build runs unchanged aside from the text; confirm no formatting or lockfile churn.
notes: Suggested branch name: chore/test-pr-flow-index-text or feature/test-pr-text-change-index
Suggested commit message: chore(index): tweak visible text for PR flow test
PR title: Test PR flow: safe text-only change in Index.tsx
PR description should include before/after text snippet and a screenshot of the rendered page
Follow workflows/pull_request_review.md and workflows/release_process.md for approvals and merge

handoff.next_required_action: Plan and assign a software engineer to make the one-line text change in src/pages/Index.tsx, create a new branch, commit, and open a PR following the acceptance criteria and templates.
